espresso.$description: Espresso — Hero and dark section background — warm-tinted near-black reads as architectural, not as raw #000, giving the oversized display type a gallery-wall feel

graphite.$description: Graphite — Primary body text, structural borders, section dividers — the workhorse neutral that draws the hairline rules and most interface lines

slate.$description: Slate — Secondary body and heading text — slightly lighter than Graphite, used for headings and emphasized body copy where Graphite is reserved for borders

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Display headings on light sections and pure-black accents — used sparingly for maximum impact on the white About and Latest sections

paper.$description: Paper — Content section surfaces and inverted text on dark hero — the bright surface that the warm espresso sections cut against

bone.$description: Bone — Warm off-white page canvas — subtle pink-ivory tint replaces plain white as the base, keeping the entire palette on the warm side of neutral

inter.$description: Primary body and UI text. The 18px body size with 1.78 line-height creates a generous, editorial reading rhythm that contrasts the compact, tight display type. The 0.89 line-height variant handles single-line labels and metadata where vertical density matters.

wtqc.$description: Signature display and heading face. The massive 197px/72px/28px scale at weight 300 with tight tracking (-0.033em → -0.014em) creates the poster-art identity. At 300 weight, headlines whisper rather than shout — authority through scale and restraint, not boldness. The lighter weight prevents the enormous letterforms from feeling heavy or aggressive.

system-ui-apple-system.$description: Tertiary fallback for cards, metadata blocks, and system-level UI that doesn't carry brand typographic weight

apple-system.$description: -apple-system — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

roboto.$description: Roboto — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

bone-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Base page background — warm off-white tints the entire site away from clinical white

paper-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Content cards, image containers, and structural sections that need to lift off the bone canvas

espresso-field.$description: Surface level 2: Full-bleed dark hero and section breaks — the warm dark that carries the massive display type

obsidian.$description: Surface level 3: Accent-only black, used for pure display headings on light sections
